mapper.sql: id, campus_location, manager_name, manager_phone, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into sys_campus (campus_location, manager_name, manager_phone, created_at, updated_at) values (#{campusLocation}, #{managerName}, #{managerPhone}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select:
select from sys_campus where id in
#{item}

select from sys_campus
and (campus_location like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or manager_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or manager_phone like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
order by id desc
